headline: ‘Ad-Supported Business Isn’t the Path to Success’: Why One Analyst Says Spotify Should Lean on Pricing Power Instead
summary: The case for owning Spotify (NYSE:SPOT) has long rested on a two-engine narrative: a Premium subscription business compounding nicely, with an Ad-Supported tier eventually catching up. On a recent Motley Fool Money earnings podcast, an analyst pushed back on the second half of that story, arguing the “ad-supported business isn’t necessarily going to be the ... ‘Ad-Supported Business Isn’t the Path to Success’: Why One Analyst Says Spotify Should Lean on Pricing Power Instead

headline: AI super rally has retail investors acting the most aggressive since trading frenzy during Covid
summary: Retail traders are buying calls in Cboe's "Mag 10" stocks – the big seven plus AMD, Palantir and Broadcom – at the heaviest 10-day clip since 2021, according to a report from the exchange.
